storage.notes: Ships with a 32GB microSD card installed. Also supports FTP/SFTP upload and the optional INSTAR Cloud (hosted on German servers).

features: microphone built in; no built-in speaker, but supports an optional active speaker via 3.5mm jack for two-way audio
MQTT v5 for smart home / Home Assistant integration
PIR heat sensor with 4 configurable alarm areas (reduces false alarms)
WiFi 5 (802.11ac) dual-band, or LAN/PoE on the non-WiFi variant
P2P remote access via QR code, no cloud account required for LAN use
operating_temp_c: -5 to 55 (-20 to 55 with optional heater accessory)

frigate.notes: INSTAR's own RTSP path convention uses numbered channel IDs (12 = main/full res, 13 = sub-stream) rather than named streams — confirm exact channel numbering against the camera's own web UI (Multimedia > Video) before publishing, as it has varied slightly across firmware versions.

home_assistant.notes: ONVIF Profile S is explicitly confirmed by the manufacturer. INSTAR also has a native MQTT interface (v5) which some users prefer over ONVIF for Home Assistant / openHAB integration since it exposes PIR and alarm-zone events directly.

blue_iris.notes: Not independently confirmed for this specific model, but ONVIF Profile S support makes it a likely fit.
